title: mentha × bulgarica
intro: Mentha × bulgarica, also known as Bulgarian mint, is a hybrid mint plant that is a cross between peppermint (Mentha × piperita) and water mint (Mentha aquatica). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Mentha × bulgarica include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Mentha × bulgarica can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
